name: EthicaMemory
description: Training Panel — see and shape what Ethica knows. View live memory state, edit insights, trigger reflection, reset sections. The architect's window into Ethica's living memory.
author: Victory

tools.name: memory_status
tools.description: Show full current memory state — profile, insights, evolution, last reflection. Pushed to Canvas Training tab.

tools.name: memory_edit
tools.description: Edit a memory field. section.field=value or significant_moments.add=text

tools.name: memory_reflect
tools.description: Trigger Ethica's reflection on demand — writes to reflection_log.json.

tools.name: memory_reset
tools.description: Reset a specific memory section. Surgical — never wipes everything.
